Video.summary: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn to sew, step-by-step with National Sewing Circle experts on CraftsyTV.
Video.grandparentTitle: National Sewing Circle presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Welcome to Artists's Academy where we are dedicated to making you a better artist. We believe everyone has an artist within, waiting to be unleashed. Our mission is to be your ultimate resource for visual art education using tutorials covering everything from fundamental techniques to advanced concepts in painting and drawing.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Every woodworker knows the constant struggle of needing more storage space in the shop. Learn to create your own shop solutions with the help of George Vondriska. He'll show you how to make a powerhouse storage system that will give you tons of additional real estate in your shop.
Video.grandparentTitle: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: DIY Storage Shelving System

Video.summary: Creative Crochet Corner is an online video streaming service all about learning how to crochet! Whether you're a new to crochet just learning the basics or an experienced crocheter looking for a challenge, Creative Crochet Corner is here to help. We offer a vast library of video tutorials taught by talented crochet experts who guide you through each technique step-by-step, sharing their best tips and tricks.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creative Crochet Corner presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Master carver George Johnson joins George Vondriska in the workshop to share his time-honored carving knowledge and show you how to make your own handcrafted holiday ornament. George demonstrates the intricate art of carving as he brings a wooden Santa-shaped ornament to life. This project makes for a thoughtful gift or a one-of-a-kind adornment for your tree.
Video.grandparentTitle: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Hand-Carved Santa Ornament

Video.summary: We all love a quilt that looks harder than it is! Join Angela for a nine-patch within a nine-patch within, yes, another nine-patch.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Wire wrapping is one of our all time favorite techniques; keep it fresh with these updates on tried and true techniques. Make a layered pendant necklace, learn how to wire wrap bangle bracelets using sliders with Barb Switzer, last, make earrings with Patti Bullard. Wire it, wear it and love it.
Video.title: Wire It

Video.summary: Whether it holds recipes, keepsakes, sewing tools, or anything else, this handmade box makes a perfect last minute gift for any occasion. George Vondriska shows you how to whip up your own handmade box in just a few simple steps.
Video.grandparentTitle: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Simple Handmade Box

Video.summary: Curved or straight, pieces define the design. Modern quilter Jen Carlton-Bailly uses templates to create contemporary curves. Fiber artist Shelly Gilliland joins Heather Grant with ideas for a quilting service day. Textile artist Chawne Kimber's colorful designs emerge as she pieces and sews a log cabin design with very small strips.
Video.title: Strips

Video.summary: Have you ever worked on a quilt that seemed intimidating, but wasn't that bad once you got into it? Watch as Angela checks this snazzy Snail's Trail quilt from her quilting bucket list.
Video.title: Snail’s Trail Quilt

Video.summary: Angela shows how to keep everything in order to make piecing a breeze.
Video.title: Bonus: Tips for Keeping Blocks Together

Image.alt: Bonus: Tips for Keeping Blocks Together
Bonus: Tips for Keeping Blocks Together
Bonus: Tips for Keeping Blocks Together

Video.summary: Do you experience stash-guilt? Well, Angela's got the cure with this scrappy stash-busting pattern.
Video.title: A Scrappy Stash-Buster Quilt Pattern

Video.summary: Quilting just got better. Join Angela in her first episode as she stitches up her exclusive variable-star quilt design.
Video.title: Stars

Video.summary: Angela shares tips to make paper piecing a breeze and explains how to troubleshoot.
Video.title: Bonus: Foundation Paper Piecing Tips

Video.summary: Angela shows you how to make half-square triangles two at a time for a dazzling quilt that's beaming with color.
Video.title: Iridescence Quilt

Video.summary: Don't you love that feeling when you use up every bit of fabric for a quilt? Tune in as Angela blazes the path to a stash-neutral quilt that leaves no scrap behind.
Video.title: Pathfinder Quilt

Video.summary: Season 10 of "The Midnight Quilt Show" wraps with Angela making modern ombré wall hanging to display in a *very* exclusive art exhibition.
Video.title: Modern Ombré Wall Hanging

Video.summary: Quilting just got better. Join Angela in her first episode as she stitches up her exclusive variable-star quilt design.
Video.title: Stars

Video.summary: Quilting just got better. Join Angela in her first episode as she stitches up her exclusive variable-star quilt design.
Video.title: Stars

Video.summary: Quilting just got better. Join Angela in her first episode as she stitches up her exclusive variable-star quilt design.
Video.title: Stars

Video.summary: She's Baaaaaack! Been itchin' for wine + stitchin'? Angela's kicking off a brand new season with a rather "puzzling" episode.
Video.title: Puzzle

Video.summary: Stitching designs or patterns on the surface of your fabric can be the perfect embellishment. Joanne Banko demonstrates machine embroidery on a kimono style dress. Then, Rebecca Kemp Brent explores visible mending - stitching that is meant to be seen and provides a decorative accent.
Video.title: Surface Embellishment

Video.summary: The 20's were a time to celebrate with shorter skirts and lots of glitz. Fashionable women wore tubular styles with bare shoulders, glitter and fringe. Angela Wolf makes a fringy tank top with today's look using knit and woven fabrics. Amber Eden shows how to sew with sequined fabric to create contemporary sparkly fashions.
Video.title: The Roaring 20's

Video.summary: It's fun to bead with friends. With a color palette for inspiration, Erin Prais-Hintz spills her beading secrets as she and Katie plan a beading party and give you more ideas for jewelry-making get-togethers. Katie uses vintage-style sliders to make glamorous chandelier earrings.
Video.title: Beading with Friends

Video.summary: Raid your art box for paint and gesso as we paint our way to fantastic layouts. Create Stencils with Jenny Barnett Rohrs, a layout from Ronda Palazzari with a technique for changing patterned paper into unique embellishments with gesso, and watercolors, and the fourth level (that's more than the third!) of dimension from Kim Hupke on a page entitled "my girl".
Video.title: Paint Your Way

Video.summary: Adding new details keeps things fresh. Christine Drumheller adds texture as she designs with thread using the sewing machine. Amy Tan sprays and spatters paint for special effects. Julie Fei-Fan Balzer wraps it all up with a review of the fresh new techniques featured throughout the series.
Video.title: Details

Video.summary: Shake up your workspace. Host Julie Fei Fan Balzer, known for her colorful aprons, shares how to make your own to reflect your mood and art style. Then, meet Kristin Gambaccini to create a simple but unique plant stand to bring a living plant into your studio. Finally, Micah Goguen shows how to make heirloom light catchers. Last is a color study -- the color purple.
Video.title: Episode 3: Your Workspace

Video.summary: Beat single sock syndrome with a little multitasking! The girls go over how to knit two socks at once so you'll never end up with solo socks again.
Video.title: Multitasking for Knitters: Two-at-a-Time Socks

Video.summary: So you’ve finished knitting your Novel-T, now what? Tune in to see how to weave in the ends when working with cotton yarn. Hint: this method involves fabric glue.
Video.title: T-Shirt Finishing Tips: Hems, Necklines + Weaving in Ends

Image.alt: T-Shirt Finishing Tips: Hems, Necklines + Weaving in Ends
T-Shirt Finishing Tips: Hems, Necklines + Weaving in Ends
T-Shirt Finishing Tips: Hems, Necklines + Weaving in Ends

Video.summary: Inspiration comes from animals and creatures -- real and imaginary. Katie makes a 3-D owl with textured wings makes a great decoration for any room. Franz and Katie make creature creation a team sport by drawing three-part fantasy animals together. Jenny looks to the sea to find inspiration for a jelly-fish made from re-cycled materials then Katie creates a glittery clay lizard textured with found items. From the Family Craft box make a pair of bear claw slippers made from tissue boxes.
Video.title: Critters and Creatures

Video.summary: With friends and family, create and wear your crafting projects. A fashionable, shimmery clay bird necklace is perfect to wear or to give as a gift. Franz shows how to draw original designs and transfer them to your t-shirt. Jenny uses plastic tableware and fabric dye to make a stenciled flower or flag on a t-shirt. Katie weaves a colorful loop bracelet you can make in your favorite colors or school colors. Use the Family Craft box to transform a t-shirt into a superhero cape with a custom-designed logo.
Video.title: Wear It!

Video.summary: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.
Video.title: Baking & Cooking

Video.summary: Welcome to CraftsyTV's Cook & Create, where delectable delights meet crafty creators.
Video.title: Cook & Create

Video.summary: Learn to quilt step by step with National Quilting Circle experts on CraftsyTV.
Video.grandparentTitle: How Should I Quilt this Quilt
Video.title: National Quilting Circle presented by CraftsyTV

Image.alt: National Quilting Circle presented by CraftsyTV
National Quilting Circle presented by CraftsyTV
National Quilting Circle presented by CraftsyTV

Video.summary: Learn to knit, step-by-step with The Knitting Circle experts on CraftsyTV.
Video.title: The Knitting Circle Presented by CraftsyTV

Image.alt: The Knitting Circle Presented by CraftsyTV
The Knitting Circle Presented by CraftsyTV
The Knitting Circle Presented by CraftsyTV
